valueMarkdown.value:
#### Summary of the Mandatory Requirements
1. One status in `Observation.status` which has a [required](terminologies.html#required) binding to: - [ObservationStatus] value set 1. A category in `Observation.category` which must have: - a fixed `Observation.category.coding.system`= **'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category'** - a fixed `Observation.category.coding.code`= **'vital-signs'**
1. A code in `Observation.code` - a fixed `Observation.code.coding.system`= **'http://loinc.org'** - a LOINC code in `Observation.code.coding.code` which has a [preferred](terminologies.html#preferred) binding to: - [Vital Signs Measurement] value set 1. One patient in `Observation.subject` 1. A date and time in `effectiveDateTime` 1. One of: - one `Observation.value[x]` of `Quantity` data type: - one numeric value in `Observation.valueQuantity.value` - a fixed `Observation.valueQuantity.system` = **'http://unitsofmeasure.org'** - a UCUM unit code in `Observation.valueQuantity.code` which has a [preferred](terminologies.html#preferred) binding to: - [Vital Signs Units] value set - if, based on `Observation.code`, the observation is not expected to have a value (e.g., this is a "panel" observation), then either: - one or more populated components (with `component.code` and either `component.value[x]` or `component.dataAbsentReason`) - `component.dataAbsentReason` has an [extensible](terminologies.html#extensible) binding to: - [Data Absent Reason] value set - one or more `hasMember` references to an `Observation` resource - if there are none of those, then one code in `Observation.dataAbsentReason`, which has an [extensible](terminologies.html#extensible) binding to: - [Data Absent Reason] value set
[Vital Signs Measurement]: valueset-observation-vitalsign-measurement.html [Vital Signs Units]: valueset-ucum-vitals-common.html [ObservationStatus]: valueset-observation-status.html [Data Absent Reason]: valueset-data-absent-reason.html

valueString.value:
#### Summary of the Mandatory Requirements
1. One status in `Observation.status` which has a [required](terminologies.html#required) binding to: - [ObservationStatus] value set 1. A category in `Observation.category` which must have: - a fixed `Observation.category.coding.system`= **'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category'** - a fixed `Observation.category.coding.code`= **'vital-signs'**
1. A code in `Observation.code` - a fixed `Observation.code.coding.system`= **'http://loinc.org'** - a LOINC code in `Observation.code.coding.code` which has a [preferred](terminologies.html#preferred) binding to: - [Vital Signs Measurement] value set 1. One patient in `Observation.subject` 1. A date and time in `effectiveDateTime` 1. One of: - one `Observation.value[x]` of `Quantity` data type: - one numeric value in `Observation.valueQuantity.value` - a fixed `Observation.valueQuantity.system` = **'http://unitsofmeasure.org'** - a UCUM unit code in `Observation.valueQuantity.code` which has a [preferred](terminologies.html#preferred) binding to: - [Vital Signs Units] value set - if, based on `Observation.code`, the observation is not expected to have a value (e.g., this is a "panel" observation), then either: - one or more populated components (with `component.code` and either `component.value[x]` or `component.dataAbsentReason`) - `component.dataAbsentReason` has an [extensible](terminologies.html#extensible) binding to: - [Data Absent Reason] value set - one or more `hasMember` references to an `Observation` resource - if there are none of those, then one code in `Observation.dataAbsentReason`, which has an [extensible](terminologies.html#extensible) binding to: - [Data Absent Reason] value set
[Vital Signs Measurement]: valueset-observation-vitalsign-measurement.html [Vital Signs Units]: valueset-ucum-vitals-common.html [ObservationStatus]: valueset-observation-status.html [Data Absent Reason]: valueset-data-absent-reason.html

definition.value: The FHIR Vitals Signs base profile sets minimum expectations for the Observation resource to record, search and fetch the vital signs associated with a patient.

human.value: if Observation.effective[x] (as dateTime) has a value then that value shall be precise at least to the day
If there is no component or hasMember element then either a value[x] or a data absent reason must be present.

definition.value: A code that classifies the general type of observation being made as a vital sign related observation, whether a point-in-time or calculated vital sign observation.

valueString.value: This identifies the vital sign or panel measurement.

description.value: This identifies the vital sign measurement.

short.value: Vital Signs are point in time measurements and are recorded using the dateTime data type

definition.value: Vital Signs are point in time measurements and are recorded using the dateTime data type.

short.value: The quantity for the vital sign being observed.

definition.value: The quantity for the vital sign being observed.

valueString.value: Common UCUM units for recording Vital Signs.

description.value: Commonly encountered UCUM units for recording Vital Signs.

short.value: Used when reporting observations included in a vital signs panel

definition.value: Used when reporting observations included in a vital signs panel.

short.value: The value for the vital sign component being observed.

definition.value: The value for the vital sign component being observed.

short.value: Vital Sign component value recorded as a component with UCUM (preferred)

definition.value: Vital Sign component value recorded as a component with UCUM (preferred).

description.value: UCUM units - for recording Vital Signs and components.
